title: TEXT value interpreted as column name in an index with empty list in an IN expression
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0('1' IN ());
ALTER TABLE t0 RENAME TO t1;
key_bug_features: Empty IN list causes TEXT to be treated as column name
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 REAL);
CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0('1' IN ());
INSERT INTO t0(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
ALTER TABLE t0 RENAME TO t1;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 IN ('value1', 'value2');
